nasb.text: From it he shall present his offering as an offering by fire to the Lord, the fat that covers the entrails and all the fat that is on the entrails,

esv.text: Then he shall offer from it, as his offering for a food offering to the Lord, the fat covering the entrails and all the fat that is on the entrails

cnv.text: 他要從供物中奉上獻給耶和華的火祭，就是把遮蓋內臟的脂肪和內臟上的脂肪，
